title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: Five production deployment patterns for AI agents: streaming tool call events for responsiveness, layered authentication (API Gateway, Cognito, IAM), type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost controls and model routing, and observability via metrics and distributed tracing. Applicable across frameworks despite AWS focus.
